title: AbioticDepletionFossilResourcesFactor
description: AbioticDepletionFossilResourcesFactor: Single value indicator for Abiotic Depletion of Fossil Resources, measured in Joules (J), refers to the over-extraction of non-renewable materials which can lead to the exhaustion of natural resources.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type EnergyPerQuantity measured in [J per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
